_comment: Minimal seed manifest for scripts/readonly_speculation_faultinj_smoke.py — one self-contained tenant: `?fn=write` speculative-commits a key into the per-tenant kvexp chain then proposes; `?fn=read` is a non-proposing read-only batch that crosses that chain-predecessor overlay (saw_speculation).
